_comment: Project-scoped hooks for finanshels_web. Keep these silent unless they catch real bugs — chatty hooks get disabled. See https://docs.claude.com/claude-code/hooks

hooks.command:
printf '
# finanshels_web — branch: %s
%s
' "$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" "$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --short 2>/dev/null | head -20)"

node -e 'const p=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH||"";const m={"collectionDefinitions.ts":"Editing collectionDefinitions.ts — if adding a field type, also update src/lib/cms/fieldCodec.ts. If adding a block, also update src/components/cms/PageBlocksRenderer.tsx. If adding a collection, set routePattern + listingRoute and update src/app/sitemap.ts + src/app/llms.txt.","firestore.rules":"Editing firestore.rules — the deny-all invariant is load-bearing. Invoke firestore-rules-reviewer when done.","middleware.ts":"Editing middleware.ts — invoke admin-auth-reviewer when done. Middleware only checks cookie presence; pages must still call requireAdminAuth().","adminAuth.ts":"Editing adminAuth.ts — invoke admin-auth-reviewer when done. Use timingSafeEqual for HMAC compare.","fieldCodec.ts":"Editing fieldCodec.ts — decode functions MUST throw InvalidFieldValueError on bad input. Never return undefined for malformed data."};for(const k of Object.keys(m)){if(p.endsWith(k)){console.error("[finanshels_web hint] "+m[k]);break;}}' 2>&1 || true
